paper_title: Investigation of Fossil Coralline Red Algae

methods.description: Process for examining thin-section slides of algal limestone using a stereo binocular microscope and photographing them for further analysis.

steps.description: Examine thin-section slides from thirty rock samples of algal limestone with a Stereo binocular Microscope model Yaxun YX AK21.
steps.searchable_summary: use stereo binocular microscope to examine thin-section slides of algal limestone
inputs: Stereo binocular Microscope model Yaxun YX AK21

steps.description: Photograph the examined slides using a CCD digital camera model KECam.
steps.searchable_summary: photograph slides using CCD digital camera

methods.description: Classification of carbonate facies and taxonomic analysis of coralline red algae based on established literature.

steps.description: Classify carbonate facies following Dunham (1962) and Flügel (2010) based on types and abundance of grains and matrix in deposits.
steps.searchable_summary: classify carbonate facies using Dunham and Flügel methods

steps.description: Perform taxonomic analysis of identified coralline red algae based on Braga (2003), Brandano and Piller (2010), and Sarkar (2017).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct taxonomic analysis using Braga, Brandano, Piller, and Sarkar methods

methods.method_name: Description of Coralline Red Algal Growth Forms
methods.description: Description of coralline red algal growth forms according to established literature.

steps.description: Describe coralline red algal growth forms according to Woelkerling et al. (1993).
steps.searchable_summary: describe algal growth forms using Woelkerling method
